# Fulfilment and Lead Times

At Acme Shop, the fulfilment process for bulk orders involves a 2–3 business day processing period where order details are reviewed and verified. Once processed, domestic orders typically deliver within 5–7 business days, while international orders can take 10–15 business days, with tracking provided post-shipment. Lead times may extend during peak seasons or due to other delays, and certain minimum purchase requirements may apply. The shipping fees for bulk orders depend on the shipment's weight, dimensions, and delivery location, with customer service available for any inquiries.

[Source: bulk_orders.md#fulfilment-and-lead-times]
